name: PubMed
notes: E-utilities API. Search: psilocybin OR MDMA OR LSD OR ketamine OR DMT OR ibogaine OR ayahuasca OR mescaline in clinical trials and research articles.

name: ClinicalTrials.gov
notes: V2 API. Filter by condition + intervention keywords. Returns structured JSON.

name: Semantic Scholar
notes: Academic paper search. Catches preprints and new publications.

name: bioRxiv/medRxiv
notes: Preprint servers. Early results before peer review.

name: MAPS.org
notes: Multidisciplinary Association for Psychedelic Studies. Press releases, study updates.

name: Chacruna Institute
notes: Cultural and ethical perspectives on psychedelics.

name: Psychedelic Alpha
notes: Industry news aggregator. Regulatory + business angles.

name: FDA Press Releases
notes: Filter for psychedelic-related approvals, breakthrough therapy designations.

name: General News
notes: Broad web search for news not caught by specific sources.
